seoTitle: How to Draw in Canva: Beginner's Drawing Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to draw in Canva using its built-in drawing tools, perfect for custom illustrations, sketches, and hand-drawn accents in your designs.
intro: Canva includes a simple drawing tool that lets you sketch freehand lines and shapes directly on your canvas, without needing separate illustration software. It's useful for adding custom accents to social posts, marking up presentations, or creating quick original graphics. This guide covers how to find the tool and use it well.

steps.heading: Open the drawing tool
steps.body: In the left-hand sidebar, look for the 'Draw' option, which opens a set of pen and brush styles.

steps.heading: Pick a pen style and color
steps.body: Choose from the available brush types and set a color that matches your design's palette.

steps.heading: Draw directly on the canvas
steps.body: Click and drag with your mouse or stylus to sketch lines, shapes, or freehand illustrations on your design.

steps.heading: Adjust stroke thickness
steps.body: Use the thickness slider to make your lines bolder or finer, depending on the effect you want.

steps.heading: Position and resize your drawing
steps.body: Once finished, drag the drawing into place and resize it like any other Canva element.

faq.question: Do I need a stylus to draw in Canva?
faq.answer: No, a mouse or trackpad works fine, though a stylus or tablet gives you more precise control.

faq.question: Can I erase part of a drawing after making it?
faq.answer: Yes, most drawing tools in Canva include an eraser option so you can correct mistakes without starting over.

faq.question: Is the drawing tool available on the free plan?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva's basic drawing tools are included for free users, with some premium brushes reserved for Pro.

faq.question: Can I use this on the Canva mobile app?
faq.answer: Yes, the drawing tool is also available in the Canva mobile app, which can feel more natural for freehand sketching.
